meaning: adj.多虫的,臭虫成灾的,<俚>神经病的n.<美>童车,<俚>尤指旧汽车,双轮单座的轻马车
examples: A social mobility charity said buggy manufacturers should look closely at the findings.
The buggy turned over and Nancy was thrown out.
Cars are prohibited, so transportation is by electric cart or by horse and buggy.
One was a cross between a Tesla Roadster and a doorless dune buggy.
Was she really then whisked offstage in a golf buggy driven by Chris Evans?
